_comment: Shop data. grocery.stock = item ids sold (price = item.value * markup, rounded up). pawn.sellRate = fraction of item.value you get when selling. venue is a teaser hub until shows arrive (Step 8). All item ids must exist in items.json.

venue.name: The Dive
venue.teaser: The booker barely looks up from her crossword. "Got a band and a demo? Then we'll talk. Stage time's for paying acts." She nods at the door.
